name: vanguard-calendar-quality-foundation
description: Development-only test and CI tooling for Vanguard Calendar. The application itself is a static, no-build vanilla HTML/CSS/JS PWA and has zero production runtime dependencies.

scripts.test:ci: node scripts/check-syntax.js && node scripts/check-duplicate-ids.js && vitest run --coverage tests/unit tests/integration tests/regression && playwright test
